questions.objective_ref: Define what a token is and explain how text is split into tokens using subword tokenisation.
Describe the next-token prediction objective and explain how a model learns by adjusting its parameters on large amounts of text.
Explain how an LLM generates text one token at a time during inference, distinguishing the prefill phase from the decode phase.
Describe the role of the attention mechanism in allowing the model to relate tokens across the context window.
Identify practical implications of tokenisation and context windows when interacting with an LLM.
